Description: There are 8 groups of 4; best two of each group advance to R16; scoring rules are for 1st and 2nd place of each group, the teams qualified for each phase and the champion.
Name: 8G4-R16

Description: There are 12 groups of 4; best two of each group and other 8 teams advance to R32; scoring rules are for 1st and 2nd place of each group, the teams qualified for each phase and the champion.
Name: 12G4-R32
